print("hello")
=======
def greet(name: str) -> None:
    """Print a personalized greeting."""
    print(f"hello, {name}")
>>>>>>> REPLACE

Applied edit to hello.py
Commit a1b2c3d feat: personalize greeting in hello.py

The greeting now takes a name parameter. Run it with greet("world").
